allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); valid=[r for r in data if r.get\('payload',{}\).get\('temperature',0\)>0 and r.get\('payload',{}\).get\('heart_rate',0\)>0]; valid.sort\(key=lambda r: int\(r['id']\)\); [print\(f\\"id:{r['id']} hr:{r['payload']['heart_rate']}\\"\) for r in valid[-5:]]")

PowerShell($response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://76ezf3ssob.execute-api.eu-north-1.amazonaws.com/apistage/data" -Method Get; Write-Host "Total records: $\($response.Count\)"; $last = $response[-1]; Write-Host "Latest:"; $last | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)

PowerShell($response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://76ezf3ssob.execute-api.eu-north-1.amazonaws.com/apistage/data"; Write-Host "Total: $\($response.Count\)"; $last = $response[-1]; Write-Host "ID: $\($last.id\)"; Write-Host "HR: $\($last.payload.heart_rate\)"; Write-Host "Temp: $\($last.payload.temperature\)"; Write-Host "AQ: $\($last.payload.air_quality\)"; Write-Host "Lat: $\($last.payload.latitude\)"; Write-Host "Lng: $\($last.payload.longitude\)")
